# Codex 真正好用的地方：把收藏变成素材

---

原文链接: [https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?\_\_biz=MzUyNTcyNDkzNg==&mid=224748...](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzUyNTcyNDkzNg==&mid=2247484451&idx=1&sn=e8ad412abbe95965386700a10c1e54b3&chksm=fb70489287dd021993c91bddbe423589dcd5067076274ce59195d29145eef87e670b3f2675ef&scene=90&xtrack=1&req_id=1781248420557644&sessionid=1781248873&subscene=93&clicktime=1781249059&enterid=1781249059&flutter_pos=1&biz_enter_id=4&ranksessionid=1781248420&jumppath=20020_1781249034546,1104_1781249037363,20020_1781249042115,1104_1781249049601&jumppathdepth=4&ascene=56&devicetype=iOS26.5&version=18004a2b&nettype=3G+&abtest_cookie=AAACAA==&lang=en&countrycode=CN&fontScale=115&exportkey=n_&pass_ticket=cUuY3azEIC5sMl/nOm4K6VxQV5zOOm5AZdLxm9rWOjU4ASYbFnfI5Jl6DawdklDm&wx_header=3)

![](.evernote-content/BD46515E-BA64-4B97-8756-9C32432339A7/0028EE16-9405-466E-937C-34642A0BB491.png)![](.evernote-content/BD46515E-BA64-4B97-8756-9C32432339A7/70F9ADAD-FB30-48A8-AC77-D4DC8A0FA566.png)![](.evernote-content/BD46515E-BA64-4B97-8756-9C32432339A7/26B19B45-0593-4397-9224-2920B539C993.png)![](.evernote-content/BD46515E-BA64-4B97-8756-9C32432339A7/26D40656-0D26-4AB4-91B5-40FF0D6FBF7A.png)![](.evernote-content/BD46515E-BA64-4B97-8756-9C32432339A7/044EB5D8-BC16-4B4F-A270-81A59E5CABD6.png)

你是不是也收藏过很多文章、截图、资料？

但真到写文章、做PPT、交汇报时，还是想不起哪条能用。

问题不在收藏太少，而在它还没变成素材。

真正有用的素材，要说清四件事：来源、观点、场景、能支撑什么内容。

Close

---
